summary: Implemented training loop for WidgetClassifier using AdamW optimizer (lr=0.001, weight_decay=0.01) with CrossEntropyLoss for 100 epochs, batch size 32. Training loss decreased from 0.4193 to 0.0025 with final training accuracy of 100%. Constant learning rate as specified. Checkpoint and training log saved to outputs/.

test_details.description: Checkpoint loads into fresh model and produces valid outputs
training_log.json has correct structure and length
Learning rate stays constant at 0.001 across all epochs
